name: BIRO JAFIR IDRISS
request: How are you brother. My name is BIRO JAFIR IDRISS. I am a refugee in kakuma Kenya and my names were recorded wrongly in my UN manifest. My name is recorded as BIRO HARUN OMAR which is wrongly recorded. It is very hard to correct these names. And also iam looking for scholarship to study my degree in Canada. Please iam requesting you to pray for me so that  UN can send to me message to tell me to go and  correct my name and get scholarship to study abroad.

name: Deng Agulet malek
